name: com.livegamelink4.unity
description: Unity Gaming Services variant: fully serverless. Cloud Code (C# .NET 9, TwitchLib.Extension) replaces a self-hosted backend; Cloud Save persists overlay state; UGS Environment Variables hold the Twitch Extension Secret. No server to deploy or maintain.

samples.description: Extensible sample templates built on ExampleBase: HUD, shop, vote, raffle, followers, channel points, customization, interactions.
